arts.ttl: Barcelona transfer news: Hansi Flick's side 'eyeing double raid' on Espanyol for highly-rated duo
arts.sum: Espanyol defender Omar El Hilali is reportedly of interest to Barcelona, with Hansi Flick's side bidding to bring in a new right-back this summer.

arts.ttl: Moving the Goalposts | How Cata Coll became the present and future of Barcelona and Spain in a year
arts.sum: Keeper suffered an ACL tear in 2022. Now she is first-choice for club and country and a World Cup and Olympic gold medal winner “Confident, risk-taker and big character,” Catalina “Cata” Coll says without hesitation when asked to describe herself as a player. The much-heralded promise of Barcelona and Spain has now become the present and the future and all it took was one summer. A dreadful ACL tear in February 2022 ended Coll’s season and, with that, her hope to become second-choice keeper, much less first. With Sandra Paños the undisputed choice in goal, Gemma Font had no competition in the second position she had already won. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Messi AND Neymar in SHOCK summer returns to Barcelona
arts.sum: Messi departed Barcelona in the summer of 2021 amidst a flood of tears, moving on a free transfer to PSG as it became evident that the Camp Nou club could no longer afford him. Now Messi, at the age of 37, is desperate to return to Barcelona, with the Catalan club seeking to complete a stunning deal that could see the Inter Miami attacker return for the opening of the renovated Camp Nou.

arts.ttl: Marc-Andre ter Stegen offers update on Barcelona return
arts.sum: Marc-Andre ter Stegen has been sidelined since September with a severe knee injury.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Barcelona see now as “right time” to swoop for Arsenal transfer target, coming weeks “crucial”
arts.sum: Barcelona are eyeing up a summer transfer window move for Newcastle United midfielder Bruno Guimaraes, who remains on the radar of Arsenal and Manchester City. Sources with a close understanding of the situation have informed CaughtOffside that Barca view this as the “right time” to try signing Guimaraes, who has long been on their radar […] The post Exclusive: Barcelona see now as “right time” to swoop for Arsenal transfer target, coming weeks “crucial” appeared first on CaughtOffside.

Hansi Flick has named a 24 man squad for the first leg of Barça's Champions League last 16 tie against Benfica. Hansi Flick's side trained at the stadium – the venue for the first leg of their last 16 tie (kick off 9pm CET) – for the final time before Wednesday's game in Lisbon.

arts.ttl: Benfica star insists he's ignoring Man Utd transfer clause amid Ruben Amorim demands
arts.sum: Manchester United have been tipped to re-sign Benfica left-back Alvaro Carreras, who never made a first-team appearance for the Red Devils but has excelled in Portugal

arts.ttl: Benfica vs Barcelona – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Benfica host Barcelona in the first leg of their Champions League last-16 tie tonight. Bruno Lage’s side will be out for revenge at The Estádio da Luz. In January, Benfica lost a Champions League classic against Barcelona in the Portuguese capital. arts.ttl: Man United 'eyeing £67m move' for Barcelona's pass master who could be the ideal midfield partner for Manuel Ugarte
arts.sum: Manchester United are allegedly preparing to move for Barcelona midfielder Marc Casado during this summer's transfer window.
